results.property_byline: INVESTMENT/VACANT - Freehold Attractive Mansion Block comprising a total of Seventy-Nine self contained Flats
features: **Three Studio Flats and Three Store Rooms are Vacant**
**Eleven (Two x One Bedroom and Nine x Studio) Flats are subject to Assured Shorthold Tenancies and One x 3 Bedroom Flat is subject to a Company Lease**
**Two x 1 Bedroom Flats are subject to Assured Tenancies and One x Studio Flat is subject to a Regulated Tenancy**

Fifty-Seven Flats are subject to (sold off on) Leases with ~~87~~ years remaining. One Flat is subject to a Lease with 97 years remaining, Two Flats are subject to Leases with 177 years remaining and One Flat is subject to a new 999 year Lease
Two Store Rooms offer Potential to form Studio Flats, subject to all necessary consents
Regent's Park and Great Portland Street underground stations are situated within a short walk
University College Hospital and The University of London's Bloomsbury Campus are both within easy reach
